title: The Ancient Shandia Village
description: Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Enel, Shandia warrior. Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: Please be a little more con-cerned, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Rope! We need some rope over here!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Did I hear something?...Umm, maybe thunder?

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: No... It was... A beautiful sound.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Like the ring of a bell...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: another... has succumbed... to the disease...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Our crops have also withering away...!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: ONLY BLOOD... RUNS ACROSS THESE LANPS NOW...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If nothing is done... this village...!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: But fear not and follow my orders!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Whom can we rely upon now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How many do the dead now number...?

summary: Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.
